description_long: This is a two-story clothing store with a simple, boxy structure and a hipped roof. The exterior is predominantly white with blue trim around the windows and base, giving it a clean, modern appearance. The front facade features three upper windows and a large ground-floor display window next to a glass entrance door, suggesting a retail environment. On the side, there are promotional posters and additional windows, indicating commercial use and advertising. The building appears to be constructed from concrete or plaster with glass elements for the windows and door. The overall design is functional and straightforward, suitable for an urban street or shopping district.
description: A two-story, white clothing store with blue trim, large display window, and simple modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three upper windows, a large display window, and a glass entrance door.
description_view_1: Side view with a promotional poster, a single upper window, and a large advertisement below.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal features, showing the back wall and part of the interior through the open base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall and no windows or signage visible.
attribute_storefront_signage: Blue and white promotional posters with text and images on the right side of the building; no prominent logo or branding on the main facade.
attribute_display_windows: One large rectangular display window on the front facade, next to the entrance door.
